description: Synthetic sample data demonstrating Skill-Bridge Career Navigator inputs and AI-generated outputs. No real personal data used.

input.message: How do I prepare for a FAANG interview?

career_chat_samples.ai_response_summary: Structured roadmap covering DSA practice, system design, behavioral questions, and a 3-month prep timeline.

resume_analysis_samples.input_resume_snippet: Ayush Kumar | React, Node.js, MongoDB | Built e-commerce platform with 10k users
resume_analysis_samples.ai_feedback_summary: Add measurable metrics, include keywords like REST API and CI/CD, improve summary section for ATS compatibility.

sample_questions: Design a URL shortener that handles 100M requests/day.
Tell me about a time you resolved a conflict in your team.
What is the difference between SQL and NoSQL? When would you use each?
